description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/penguins.csv' is already open in JASP. This is the Palmer Penguins dataset from the Palmer Station Long Term Ecological Research program in Antarctica. It contains morphometric measurements for 334 penguins across three species (Adelie, Chinstrap, Gentoo) from three islands. The columns include: species, island, bill_length_mm, bill_depth_mm, flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g, sex, and year. Perform a comprehensive exploratory data analysis and save the results as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/penguins_eda.jasp'. The analysis must include descriptive statistics (Mean, Std. deviation, Median, Minimum, and Maximum) and distribution plots for the four morphometric variables (bill_length_mm, bill_depth_mm, flipper_length_mm, body_mass_g) split by species. Conduct a correlation analysis for these four variables including significance reporting, flagged correlations, and a heatmap. Additionally, perform a one-way ANOVA with body_mass_g as the dependent variable and species as the fixed factor, including Tukey post hoc tests and descriptive statistics. Save the completed analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/penguins_eda.jasp.
